item.title: Terminator Zero: 1×8
item.description:
Kenta wrestles with a brutal choice and the Terminator reveals a shocking truth as the future of humankind hangs in the balance.

The post Terminator Zero: 1×8 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Kenta wrestles with a brutal choice and the Terminator reveals a shocking truth as the future of humankind hangs in the balance.

The post Terminator Zero: 1×8 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×1
item.description:
Ancient Rome’s elite plot against the rioting citizens; a cunning Plebeian schemes to change his fate; Spanish brothers arrive to sell horses for the Roman Games; three African siblings are forcibly taken to Rome, followed by their vengeful mother.

The post Those About to Die: 1×1 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Ancient Rome’s elite plot against the rioting citizens; a cunning Plebeian schemes to change his fate; Spanish brothers arrive to sell horses for the Roman Games; three African siblings are forcibly taken to Rome, followed by their vengeful mother.

The post Those About to Die: 1×1 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×2
item.description:
Tenax and Domitian form a racing faction and recruit Scorpus; Antonia and Marsus undermine their efforts while Cala offers to help Tenax to protect her daughters; Emperor Vespasian ponders on his successor.

The post Those About to Die: 1×2 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Tenax and Domitian form a racing faction and recruit Scorpus; Antonia and Marsus undermine their efforts while Cala offers to help Tenax to protect her daughters; Emperor Vespasian ponders on his successor.

The post Those About to Die: 1×2 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×3
item.description:
Kwame and Viggo bond over their ill-fated futures; the Gold Faction puts on a lavish display at the inaugural chariot races; Queen Berenice tries to convince Titus of his brother’s treacherous plans to claim the throne; Vespasian chooses his heir.

The post Those About to Die: 1×3 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Kwame and Viggo bond over their ill-fated futures; the Gold Faction puts on a lavish display at the inaugural chariot races; Queen Berenice tries to convince Titus of his brother’s treacherous plans to claim the throne; Vespasian chooses his heir.

The post Those About to Die: 1×3 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×4
item.description:
Titus shuts down the Gold Faction to appease the Patricians while Scorpus, suspicious of Tenax’s plan, joins the White Faction; Domitian orchestrates a grisly spectacle to show his strength; Tenax meets Ursus, a dangerous man from his past.

The post Those About to Die: 1×4 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Titus shuts down the Gold Faction to appease the Patricians while Scorpus, suspicious of Tenax’s plan, joins the White Faction; Domitian orchestrates a grisly spectacle to show his strength; Tenax meets Ursus, a dangerous man from his past.

The post Those About to Die: 1×4 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×5
item.description:
To save his image and cement his authority, Titus sends Berenice away and marries his cousin, a Roman; Tenax’s dark past is finally revealed, and his chase for Ursus leaves someone dead; Kwame prepares for his fight with Flamma.

The post Those About to Die: 1×5 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
To save his image and cement his authority, Titus sends Berenice away and marries his cousin, a Roman; Tenax’s dark past is finally revealed, and his chase for Ursus leaves someone dead; Kwame prepares for his fight with Flamma.

The post Those About to Die: 1×5 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×6
item.description:
A dark day looms over Rome with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius; Titus punishes Marsus and the Patricians involved in a planned coup; Domitian convinces Titus to reinstate the Gold Faction; Tenax is dangerously wounded in battle.

The post Those About to Die: 1×6 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
A dark day looms over Rome with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius; Titus punishes Marsus and the Patricians involved in a planned coup; Domitian convinces Titus to reinstate the Gold Faction; Tenax is dangerously wounded in battle.

The post Those About to Die: 1×6 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×7
item.description:
Tenax reveals his past to Cala as she tends to his wounds; Scorpus grows increasingly jealous as the elder Corsi brothers, Andria and Fonsoa, win races for the Gold Faction; Kwame faces Flamma in a rematch; Tenax and Cala face off with Ursus.

The post Those About to Die: 1×7 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Tenax reveals his past to Cala as she tends to his wounds; Scorpus grows increasingly jealous as the elder Corsi brothers, Andria and Fonsoa, win races for the Gold Faction; Kwame faces Flamma in a rematch; Tenax and Cala face off with Ursus.

The post Those About to Die: 1×7 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Those About to Die: 1×8
item.description:
Following a devastating racetrack accident, Elia Corsi accuses Scorpus of causing the tragedy; Antonia allows Elia to join the Blue Faction to seek revenge.

The post Those About to Die: 1×8 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Following a devastating racetrack accident, Elia Corsi accuses Scorpus of causing the tragedy; Antonia allows Elia to join the Blue Faction to seek revenge.

The post Those About to Die: 1×8 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.

item.title: Presumed Innocent: 1×8
item.description:
The truth behind Carolyn’s murder is revealed.

The post Presumed Innocent: 1×8 first appeared on Filme Online Subtitrate in Romana 2025.
